title: [AI5] Run Grok as an Agent Client Protocol (ACP) agent
summary: Added a TNF ACP launch path for Grok. `tnf acp grok --dry-run` now emits the external-agent contract, and the live path starts an ACP server, exports endpoint metadata, optionally registers a Grok worker in Redis, and forwards execution to the Grok CLI when installed.

verification.command: pnpm --dir packages/tnf-cli exec tsx src/cli.ts acp grok --dry-run -- agent test -o
verification.notes: Dry-run emitted the Grok ACP launch contract with command `grok agent test -o` and ACP endpoint environment.
